---
title: "DSP DE Analysis - Kidney Test Dataset"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
editor: visual

params:
  data.folder: "test_datasets/Human_Kidney/"
  de.folder: "test_datasets/Human_Kidney/de/"
  dataset.name: "human_kidney_test_"
---

# DE Analysis

```{r Setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(GeomxTools)
library(dplyr)
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)
library(PCAtools)
library(readxl)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(DSPWorkflow)
library(standR)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(patchwork)
library(openxlsx)

# Source the helper functions
source("DSP_functions.R")

```

### Load the all Input Counts and Annotation

```{r Load Normalized Counts}

normalized.object <- readRDS(file = paste0(params$data.folder,
                                                 params$dataset.name, 
                                                 "q3normalized_object.RDS"))

# Load the StandR RUV object
standr.ruv.object <- readRDS(file = paste0(params$data.folder, "StandR/standr_ruv_object.RDS"))



```

## Comparison Parameters

```{r}
# Parameters shared across all comparisons
common.comparison.parameters <- list(
  
  # DE methods to run.
  # Options:
  #   de.method = "default"
  #   de.method = "standr"
  #   de.method = c("default", "standr")
  #
  # When both are supplied, the functions run them in this order:
  #   default, then standr
  de.method = c("default", "standr"),
  
  # StandR defaults shared across comparisons
  standr = list(
    object.name = "standr.ruv.object",
    covariates = c("ruv_W1", "ruv_W2"),
    block.field = "slide_name",
    filter.by.expr = TRUE,
    estimate.disp.robust = TRUE,
    ebayes.robust = TRUE,
    plot.voom = FALSE,
    sort.by = "P",
    clean.design.names = TRUE,
    print.design.columns = TRUE, 
    remove.batch.for.gsea = FALSE
  ),
  
  # Volcano parameters
  fc.limit = 1,
  padj.limit = 0.05,
  n.labels = 10,

  write.results = TRUE,
  overwrite.results = FALSE,

  title.size = 22,
  legend.coordinates = c(.99, .1),
  x.lab = "Log2 Fold Change",
  y.lab = "-Log10 adjusted p-value",
  dotted.line.color = "black",
  alpha = 1,
  nonDE.color = "gray60",
  upDE.color = "red",
  downDE.color = "blue",
  label.size = 8,
  nolabel.label.size = 4,
  label.color = "black",
  axis.tick.label.size = 20,
  legend.text.size = 20,
  axis.title.size = 20,

  volcano.width = 14,
  volcano.height = 10, 
  
  label.top.genes = FALSE,
  make.nolabel.volcano = FALSE,

  export.volcano = FALSE,
  export.volcano.nolabel = FALSE,
  export.gsea.input = FALSE
)


# Individual comparisons with unique parameters
de.comparisons <- list(
  
  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "DKD_Tubule_panck_pos_vs_neg",
      heading = "DKD Tubule PanCK Pos vs. Neg",
      
      overwrite.results = FALSE,

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"),
        region = c("tubule"),
        segment = c("PanCK_pos")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("DKD"),
        region = c("tubule"),
        segment = c("PanCK_neg")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Within Groups",
      region.col = "segment",
      regions = c("PanCK_pos", "PanCK_neg"),
      group.col = "region",
      groups = c("tubule"),
      legend.title = "Expression in PanCK+",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "segment",
        contrast.numerator = "PanCK_pos",
        contrast.denominator = "PanCK_neg"
      ), 
      
      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "DKD Tubule - PanCK Pos vs. Neg",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "segment",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("PanCK_pos", "PanCK_neg")
    )
  ), 

  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "Glomerulus_DKD_vs_Normal",
      heading = "Glomerulus DKD vs Normal",

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("normal"), 
        region = c("glomerulus")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Between Groups",
      region.col = "region",
      regions = c("glomerulus"),
      group.col = "class",
      groups = c("DKD", "normal"),
      legend.title = "Expression in DKD",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      # For DKD vs normal, the design annotation should be class.
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "class",
        contrast.numerator = "DKD",
        contrast.denominator = "normal"
      ), 

      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "Glomerulus DKD vs. Normal",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "class",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("DKD", "normal")
    )
  ),
  
  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "DKD_Glomerulus_vs_Tubule",
      heading = "DKD Glomerulus vs Tubule",

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Within Groups",
      region.col = "region",
      regions = c("glomerulus", "tubule"),
      group.col = "class",
      groups = c("DKD"),
      legend.title = "Expression in Glomerulus",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      # For glomerulus vs tubule, the design annotation should be region.
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "region",
        contrast.numerator = "glomerulus",
        contrast.denominator = "tubule"
      ), 

      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "DKD Glomerulus vs. Tubule",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "region",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
    )
  )
)


```

## Run DE Comparisons

```{r}

de.outputs <- run_all_de_comparisons(
  de.comparisons = de.comparisons,
  normalized.object = normalized.object,
  params = params,
  standr.object = standr.ruv.object
)
```

## Venn Diagram to Compare Method DEGs

### Venn Function

```{r}

# Venn Diagram function

method_degs_venn <- function(de.results, 
                             title, 
                             logfc.cutoff){ 
  
  # Gather the up and down degs for each result
  up.standr <- de.results$method.results$standr$results %>% 
    filter(padj < 0.05, logfc >= logfc.cutoff)
  up.standr.degs <- up.standr$gene
  
  down.standr <- de.results$method.results$standr$results %>% 
    filter(padj < 0.05, logfc <= -logfc.cutoff)
  down.standr.degs <- down.standr$gene
  
  up.default <- de.results$method.results$default$results %>% 
    filter(padj < 0.05, logfc >= logfc.cutoff)
  up.default.degs <- up.default$gene
  
  down.default <- de.results$method.results$default$results %>% 
    filter(padj < 0.05, logfc <= -logfc.cutoff)
  down.default.degs <- down.default$gene
  
  
  up.venn <- ggVennDiagram(list("StandR" = up.standr.degs, 
                                "Default" = up.default.degs), 
                           label = "count", 
                           set_size = 0) + 
    scale_fill_gradient(low="grey90",high = "red") + 
    ggtitle(paste0("Upregulated DEGs, logFC > ", logfc.cutoff)) + 
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0,
      y = 7.0,
      label = "Default",
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold") +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0,
      y = -3.0,
      label = "StandR",
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold")
  
  down.venn <- ggVennDiagram(list("StandR" = down.standr.degs, 
                                "Default" = down.default.degs), 
                             label = "count", 
                             set_size = 0) + 
    scale_fill_gradient(low="grey90",high = "blue") + 
    ggtitle(paste0("Downregulated DEGs, logFC < -", logfc.cutoff)) + 
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0,
      y = 7.0,
      label = "Default",
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold") +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0,
      y = -3.0,
      label = "StandR",
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold")
  
  all.venn <- up.venn + down.venn + 
    plot_layout(ncol = 2) + 
    plot_annotation(title = title, 
                    theme = theme(
                      plot.title = element_text(
                      size = 16,
                      face = "bold",
                      hjust = 0.5)
                      )
    )
  
  
  # Get the overlapping DEGs list
  up.shared <- intersect(up.standr.degs, up.default.degs) 
  up.standr.unique <- setdiff(up.standr.degs, up.default.degs)
  up.default.unique <- setdiff(up.default.degs, up.standr.degs)
  down.shared <- intersect(down.standr.degs, down.default.degs)
  down.standr.unique <- setdiff(down.standr.degs, down.default.degs)
  down.default.unique <- setdiff(down.default.degs, down.standr.degs)
  
  venn.degs.df <- data.frame(
    group = c(rep("up_shared", length(up.shared)),
              rep("up_standr", length(up.standr.unique)),
              rep("up_default", length(up.default.unique)), 
              rep("down_shared", length(down.shared)),
              rep("down_standr", length(down.standr.unique)),
              rep("down_default", length(down.default.unique))
              ),
  gene = c(
    up.shared, 
    up.standr.unique, 
    up.default.unique, 
    down.shared, 
    down.standr.unique, 
    down.default.unique
    )
)
  
  
  
  return(list("up.venn" = up.venn, 
              "down.venn" = down.venn, 
              "all.venn" = all.venn, 
              "venn.degs.df" = venn.degs.df))
  
}

```

### Create Venn Diagrams

```{r}

# Toggle for the deg list to be written out as an excel file
write.deg.lists <- TRUE

# Toggle to export the venn diagrams
export.venn <- TRUE


comparison.venn.list <- list()

for(comparison in names(de.outputs)){
  
  comparison.de.results <- de.outputs[[comparison]]
  
  comparison.title <- str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", comparison))
  comparison.venn.diagrams <- method_degs_venn(de.results = comparison.de.results, 
                                               title = comparison.title, 
                                               logfc.cutoff = 1)
  
  comparison.venn.list[[comparison]] <- comparison.venn.diagrams
  
  if(export.venn){
    
    ggsave(comparison.venn.diagrams$all.venn, 
           file = paste0(params$de.folder, 
                         "method_comparison/", 
                         comparison, 
                         "_de_venn.png"))
    
  }
  
  
}




# Create an excel output file with one tab per contrast
if(write.deg.lists == TRUE){
  
  deg.list.output <- createWorkbook()
  
  for(comparison in names(comparison.venn.list)){
    
    deg.list <- comparison.venn.list[[comparison]]$venn.degs.df
    
    addWorksheet(deg.list.output, comparison)
    writeData(deg.list.output, 
              sheet = comparison, 
              deg.list)
    
    saveWorkbook(deg.list.output, 
                 paste0(params$de.folder, 
                        "method_comparison/", 
                        "deg_list_method_comparison.xlsx"), 
                 overwrite = TRUE)
  }
  
}
  



```
